hubspot.note: Net-new prospect, no existing relationship — not on the strategic account list.

meddpiccNotes.metrics: IT Director cited ~15 hrs/week of manual access-review work the tool would eliminate.
meddpiccNotes.decisionCriteria: SOC2 coverage, SSO support, per-seat pricing under $50/mo.
meddpiccNotes.decisionProcess: Unclear — IT Director said 'I'll need to check with leadership' but never specified who.
meddpiccNotes.identifyPain: Manual quarterly access reviews across shared drives, flagged in a recent internal audit.
meddpiccNotes.champion: IT Director drove the demo and two follow-up calls, then went quiet.

activityTimeline.summary: IT Director says he needs to 'check with leadership' before proceeding.

emails.subject: Re: Data Governance Platform — next steps
emails.snippet: This looks great, but I'll need to check with leadership before we can move forward. Will follow up.

proposal.summary: Standard proposal sent to IT Director; no confirmed recipient above IT Director level.
proposal.scopeSummary: Annual license, up to 500 seats, standard onboarding.
